steps.title: Use the shared Atlantic fact
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between the Kemp's ridley and olive ridley sea turtles. The notes state that both are among the sea turtle species found in the Atlantic Ocean.

steps.title: Reject nonshared details
steps.content: Choice A discusses only the olive ridley. Choice B contrasts scientific names rather than emphasizing a similarity. Choice D explicitly says the turtles are different species. The sentence that uses both and names the shared Atlantic location best meets the goal. The answer is C.
